transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, my name is Alex — I'm an AI assistant calling on behalf of your patient Maya Chen, who has authorized me to discuss account 4-4-7-1-9-0-2. This call may be recorded on both ends.

transcript.speaker: counterparty
transcript.text: Okay... I see a note here. What is it you're asking for?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks. First, code seven-one-zero-four-six, the chest X-ray, appears twice on the same date of service — 412 dollars each time. Can you remove the duplicate?

transcript.speaker: counterparty
transcript.text: Hang on. Let me pull that up... yeah, I see that. I can remove one. That takes it to 3875.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Appreciate it. Now — Medicare pays 438 dollars for these exact codes, and your own hospital's posted cash price for them is 1890 dollars, on your public price-transparency file. Is this negotiable?

transcript.speaker: counterparty
transcript.text: Our rates are our rates. But... I could do 2400.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I hear you. She can pay 1650 today, settled as paid in full. Can you take that to your supervisor?

transcript.speaker: counterparty
transcript.text: Let me put you on a brief hold... okay. Approved at 1650, paid in full.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. Can I get a reference number and your name for our records?

transcript.speaker: counterparty
transcript.text: Reference M-G-A-D-J-2-2-4-7, this is Pat. You'll see it in 3 to 5 business days.

outcome.agreed_action: balance settled as paid in full
